2700.full_name: Ibrahim bin  al-Harith bin Khalid b. Sakhar b. 'Amir b. Ka'b b. Sa'd b. Taym b. Murrah
2700.bio: According to some sources,he migrated to Abyssinia with his father.

2702.full_name: 'Iyad bin al-Harith bin Khalid b. Sakhar b. 'Amir b. Ka'b b. Sa'd b. Taym b. Murrah

2703.full_name: Subayha bin al-Harith bin Jabala b. 'Amir b. Ka'b b. Sa'd b. Taym b. Murrah

2704.full_name: 'Uthman bin 'Ubaidullah b. 'Uthman b. 'Amr b. Ka'b b. Sa'd b. Taym b. Murrah b. Ka'b
2704.arabic: عثمان بن عبيد الله بن عثمان التيمي

2705.full_name: 'Abdur Rahman bin 'Uthman bin 'Ubaidullah b. 'Uthman b. 'Amr b. Ka'b b. Sa'd b. Taym b. Murrah
2705.arabic: عبد الرحمن بن عثمان بن عبيد الله

2706.full_name: Mu'adh bin 'Abdur Rahman bin 'Uthman bin 'Ubaidullah b. 'Uthman b. 'Amr b. Ka'b b. Sa'd b. Taym
2706.arabic: معاذ بن عبد الرحمن بن عثمان التيمي
2706.spouses: Umm 'Amr bint 'Utayba of B.Sa'd b. Bakr,Maryam bint 'Uqba,al-Munqariya

2710.full_name: al-Munkdar bin 'Abdullah bin al-Hudayr bin 'Abdul 'Uzza b. 'Amir b. al-Harith b. Haritha b. Sa'd
2710.arabic: المنكدر بن عبد الله بن الهدير
2710.bio: Full Lineage: al-Munkdar bin 'Abdullah bin al-Hudayr bin 'Abdul 'Uzza b. 'Amir b. al-Harith b. Haritha b. Sa'd b. Taym b. Murrah b. Ka'b b. Lu'ayy..

2711.full_name: Rabi'a bin 'Abdullah bin al-Hudayr bin 'Abdul 'Uzza b. 'Amir b. al-Harith b. Haritha b. Sa'd b. Taym
2711.arabic: ربيعة بن عبد الله بن الهدير
2711.bio: Full Lineage: Rabi'a bin 'Abdullah bin al-Hudayr bin 'Abdul 'Uzza b. 'Amir b. al-Harith b. Haritha b. Sa'd b. Taym b. Murrah b. Ka'b b. Lu'ayy..

2712.full_name: 'Abdullah bin al-Hudayr bin 'Abdul 'Uzza b. 'Amir b. al-Harith b. Haritha b. Sa'd b. Taym
2712.bio: Full Lineage: 'Abdullah bin al-Hudayr bin 'Abdul 'Uzza b. 'Amir b. al-Harith b. Haritha b. Sa'd b. Taym b. Murrah b. Ka'b b. Lu'ayy..

2750.full_name: Umayma bint 'Abdullah bin Bijad b. 'Umayr b. al-Harith b. Haritha b. Sa'd b. Taym b. Murra b. Ka'b

2751.full_name: Zaynab bint al-Harith bin Khalid b. Sakhar b. 'Amir b. Ka'b b. Sa'd b. Taym b. Murrah
2751.arabic: زينب بنت الحارث بن خالد التميمية
2751.bio: She died with her mother and brother on the way back from Abyssinia. They drank poisoned water.

2752.full_name: 'Aisha bint al-Harith bin Khalid b. Sakhar b. 'Amir b. Ka'b b. Sa'd b. Taym b. Murrah
2752.arabic: عائشة بنت الحارث بن خالد التميمية
2752.bio: She died with her mother and brother on the way back from Abyssinia. They drank poisoned water.
